name: metalnest-digital-twin
description: MetalNest Digital Twin — CNC rulo-açma simülasyonu + akıllı üretim planlama motoru

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n demo3d,dashboard,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @metalnest/demo-3d" "npm run dev -w @metalnest/sales-dashboard" "npm run dev -w @metalnest/electron-shell"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n demo3d,dashboard -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @metalnest/demo-3d" "npm run dev -w @metalnest/sales-dashboard"
